errors.name: ERR_AUBE_NO_LOCKFILE
errors.description: An operation that required a lockfile (`--frozen-lockfile`, `aube fetch`, etc.) found none in the project.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_LOCKFILE_PARSE
errors.description: Lockfile is structurally invalid — version guard failed, YAML shape is wrong, or `yaml_serde` couldn't round-trip the contents.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_LOCKFILE_UNSUPPORTED_FORMAT
errors.description: Lockfile filename was recognized but its format isn't supported on this aube version.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_NO_MATCHING_VERSION
errors.description: No published version of the named package satisfies the requested range.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_NO_MATURE_MATCHING_VERSION
errors.description: A version satisfying the range exists but every candidate was younger than `minimumReleaseAge` and `minimumReleaseAgeStrict=true`.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_BLOCKED_EXOTIC_SUBDEP
errors.description: Transitive dep used a `git:` / `file:` / `tarball` specifier and `blockExoticSubdeps=true`.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_TRUST_DOWNGRADE
errors.description: Picked version dropped trust evidence the prior version had (`trustPolicy=no-downgrade`).

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_TRUST_MISSING_TIME
errors.description: Registry's packument has no `time` entry for the picked version (`trustPolicy=no-downgrade`).

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_UNKNOWN_CATALOG
errors.description: A `catalog:<name>` reference was used but the catalog isn't defined.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_UNKNOWN_CATALOG_ENTRY
errors.description: The catalog exists but has no entry for the requested package.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_PEER_CONTEXT_NOT_CONVERGED
errors.description: Peer-context fixed-point loop hit `MAX_ITERATIONS=16` without converging — usually mutually-recursive peers.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_REGISTRY_ERROR
errors.description: Generic registry error from inside the resolver.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_TRUST_EXCLUDE_INVALID_VERSION_UNION
errors.description: A `trustPolicyExclude` pattern had a non-exact version.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_TRUST_EXCLUDE_NAME_GLOB_WITH_VERSIONS
errors.description: A `trustPolicyExclude` pattern combined a name glob with versions.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_TARBALL_INTEGRITY
errors.description: Downloaded tarball's hash didn't match the lockfile's / packument's `dist.integrity`.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_TARBALL_EXTRACT
errors.description: Tarball couldn't be extracted (corrupt gzip, unexpected entry shape, etc.).

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_PKG_CONTENT_MISMATCH
errors.description: Tarball's `package.json` declared a different `(name, version)` than the resolver expected (`strictStorePkgContentCheck=true`).

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_GIT_ERROR
errors.description: Git operation failed during a `git:` dep prepare or checkout.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_NO_HOME
errors.description: `HOME` (or platform equivalent) is unset, so aube can't locate its store.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_PACKAGE_NOT_FOUND
errors.description: Registry returned 404 for the package name.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_VERSION_NOT_FOUND
errors.description: Package exists but the requested version doesn't.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_UNAUTHORIZED
errors.description: Registry returned 401/403 — missing or invalid auth. Run `aube login`.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_OFFLINE
errors.description: Offline mode and the requested resource isn't in the local cache.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_INVALID_PACKAGE_NAME
errors.description: A name doesn't match npm's grammar — rejected before any I/O so a hostile manifest can't use the cache-path builder as a write primitive.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_REGISTRY_WRITE_REJECTED
errors.description: Registry rejected a publish/deprecate/owner write with a non-2xx response.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_SCRIPT_NON_ZERO_EXIT
errors.description: A lifecycle script (`preinstall` / `install` / `postinstall` / a `package.json` script) exited non-zero.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_SCRIPT_SPAWN
errors.description: Couldn't spawn a script's interpreter (shell missing, jail setup failed, etc.).

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_BUILD_POLICY_UNSUPPORTED_VALUE
errors.description: An entry in `allowBuilds` had a value that wasn't `true`/`false`.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_BUILD_POLICY_INVALID_VERSION_UNION
errors.description: An `allowBuilds` pattern's version union was unparseable.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_BUILD_POLICY_WILDCARD_WITH_VERSION
errors.description: An `allowBuilds` pattern combined a wildcard name with a version union.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_PATCH_FAILED
errors.description: Applying a `pnpm.patchedDependencies` patch failed.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_LINK_FAILED
errors.description: Symlink / junction / hardlink couldn't be created — usually permissions or filesystem support.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_MISSING_PACKAGE_INDEX
errors.description: Internal: a caller skipped `load_index` but the package wasn't already materialized.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_MISSING_STORE_FILE
errors.description: A package index references a CAS shard that doesn't exist on disk. Re-run install to re-fetch.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_MANIFEST_PARSE
errors.description: A `package.json` had a syntax error. miette renders a pointer at the offending byte.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_WORKSPACE_PARSE
errors.description: An `aube-workspace.yaml` / `pnpm-workspace.yaml` was structurally invalid.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_MANIFEST_YAML_PARSE
errors.description: A workspace YAML helper file was structurally invalid (no source pointer available).

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_FILTER_EMPTY
errors.description: `--filter` was passed an empty selector.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_FILTER_GIT_IO
errors.description: A `--filter ...[ref]` selector failed to spawn `git`.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_FILTER_GIT_FAILED
errors.description: The git subprocess for a `--filter ...[ref]` selector exited non-zero.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_UNSUPPORTED_ENGINE
errors.description: One or more packages declared an `engines` constraint incompatible with the running Node/aube and `engine-strict=true`.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_UNKNOWN_COMMAND
errors.description: The named subcommand isn't a built-in aube command and isn't a script in the manifest.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_NPM_ONLY_COMMAND
errors.description: The user invoked an npm-only command (`whoami`, `token`, `owner`, `search`, `pkg`, `set-script`) — aube doesn't implement these; use npm.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_RECURSIVE_NOT_SUPPORTED
errors.description: A command was invoked under `--recursive` but doesn't support recursive execution.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_COMPLETION_FAILED
errors.description: `aube completion` couldn't invoke `usage` to render the shell completions.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_REMOVE_PRIOR_INSTALL_DIR
errors.description: Couldn't clean up a prior global install dir before re-installing.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_UNSAFE_INDEX_KEY
errors.description: A package index key tried to escape its directory (path traversal defense in depth).

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_UNSAFE_SHEBANG_INTERPRETER
errors.description: A `#!` shebang named an unsafe interpreter when generating a shim — substituted with `node` instead. Surfaced as `tracing::error!` but install continues.

errors.name: ERR_AUBE_PATCHES_TRACKING_WRITE
errors.description: Couldn't write `.aube-applied-patches.json` after applying patches. Non-fatal; next install may miss stale patched entries.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_PNPMFILE_NOT_FOUND
warnings.description: A pnpmfile path (CLI arg, workspace setting, global) pointed at a missing file.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_PNPMFILE_STDERR_FORWARDER
warnings.description: The background task forwarding pnpmfile stderr panicked.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_HOOK_IMPORTER_MUTATED
warnings.description: A pnpmfile `afterAllResolved` hook mutated `importers[...]`; aube ignored the edit.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_HOOK_IMPORTER_ADDED
warnings.description: A pnpmfile `afterAllResolved` hook added a new `importers[...]` entry; aube ignored it.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_HOOK_IDENTITY_REWRITTEN
warnings.description: A pnpmfile hook rewrote a package's `(name, version)` identity; aube reverted the edit.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_HOOK_PACKAGE_ADDED
warnings.description: A pnpmfile hook added a wholly-new package entry; aube ignored it.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_IGNORED_BUILD_SCRIPTS
warnings.description: Dep had `preinstall`/`install`/`postinstall` scripts but isn't on the `allowBuilds` allowlist. Run `aube approve-builds`.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_MISSING_INTEGRITY
warnings.description: Lockfile entry / registry response had no `dist.integrity`; importing without verification. Set `strict-store-integrity=true` to refuse.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_CACHE_WRITE_FAILED
warnings.description: Couldn't write a package index to the on-disk cache. Non-fatal.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_CLONE_STRATEGY_FALLBACK
warnings.description: `package-import-method=clone` will silently fall back to copy if the filesystem doesn't support reflinks.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_LTHASH_MISMATCH
warnings.description: Incremental and full LtHash digests disagreed — homomorphic invariant broken. Real bug signal.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_DELTA_INVALIDATE_FAILED
warnings.description: Delta install couldn't invalidate a package directory during cleanup.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_GVS_INCOMPATIBLE
warnings.description: A package isn't compatible with aube's global virtual store; installed per-project instead.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_GVS_MODE_CHANGED
warnings.description: Switching between gvs-on and gvs-off; removing `node_modules` and reinstalling from scratch.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_CONCURRENCY
warnings.description: `network-concurrency` or `link-concurrency` was 0 (must be ≥ 1).

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_TRUST_POLICY
warnings.description: A `trustPolicyExclude` entry was malformed and skipped.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_OVERRIDE_MISSING_DEP
warnings.description: An `overrides` `$ref` pointed at a package not in any of the importer's dependency lists.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_PEER_PATTERN
warnings.description: A `peerDependencyRules` pattern was unparseable and skipped.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_SAVE_PREFIX
warnings.description: `save-prefix` was something other than `^`, `~`, or empty. Falling back to `^`.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_CONCURRENCY_ENV_INVALID
warnings.description: The `AUBE_CONCURRENCY` env var was outside the `[floor, ceiling]` range or non-numeric.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_PRERELEASE_CHECK_SKIPPED
warnings.description: `aube update` couldn't fetch the packument or got a non-semver `latest` tag; preserved-prerelease check skipped for that package.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_AUDIT_FETCH_FAILED
warnings.description: `aube audit --ignore-unfixable` couldn't fetch a packument; advisories for that package are kept verbatim.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_TOKEN_CHMOD_FAILED
warnings.description: `chmod 0600` on the auth token file failed; the file may be world-readable.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_UNTRUSTED_PROXY
warnings.description: A `*-proxy` setting came from a source aube doesn't trust (committed `.npmrc` can't set proxies).

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_UNTRUSTED_STRICT_SSL_DISABLE
warnings.description: `strict-ssl=false` came from a source aube doesn't trust. TLS validation stays on.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_LOCAL_ADDRESS
warnings.description: `local-address` setting wasn't a valid IP.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_MAXSOCKETS
warnings.description: `maxsockets` was 0 or non-numeric.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_UNTRUSTED_TOKEN_HELPER
warnings.description: `tokenHelper` came from an untrusted source (CVE-2025-69262 class).

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_TOKEN_HELPER
warnings.description: `tokenHelper` value wasn't a sanitized absolute path.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_TOKEN_HELPER_SPAWN_FAILED
warnings.description: `tokenHelper` couldn't be spawned.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_TOKEN_HELPER_NON_ZERO_EXIT
warnings.description: `tokenHelper` exited non-zero.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_HTTP_RETRY_TRANSIENT
warnings.description: Retrying after a transient HTTP status (429, 5xx).

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_HTTP_RETRY_TRANSPORT
warnings.description: Retrying after a transport / connection error.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_HTTP_RETRY_BODY_READ
warnings.description: Retrying after a response-body read error (timeout, partial body).

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_HTTP_RETRY_BODY_DECODE
warnings.description: Retrying after a JSON decode error on the response body.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_PACKUMENT_CACHE_WRITE
warnings.description: Couldn't write a packument to the on-disk cache after a successful fetch. Non-fatal; next install will refetch.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_SLOW_METADATA
warnings.description: A packument fetch exceeded `fetchWarnTimeoutMs`.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_SLOW_TARBALL
warnings.description: A tarball download fell below `fetchMinSpeedKiBps`.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_HTTPS_PROXY
warnings.description: `https-proxy` URL didn't parse.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_HTTP_PROXY
warnings.description: `http-proxy` URL didn't parse.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_CA
warnings.description: Per-registry CA PEM didn't parse.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_CAFILE
warnings.description: `cafile` couldn't be parsed as a PEM bundle.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_UNREADABLE_CAFILE
warnings.description: `cafile` couldn't be read from disk.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_INVALID_CLIENT_CERT
warnings.description: Per-registry client `cert`/`key` PEM pair didn't parse.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_UNSUPPORTED_PLATFORM_INSTALL
warnings.description: A required (non-optional) dep declared a platform aube doesn't satisfy; installing anyway.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_EXOTIC_SUBDEP_SKIPPED
warnings.description: An optional or peer dep used an exotic specifier and was skipped under `blockExoticSubdeps=true`.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_PEER_DEDUPE_COLLISION
warnings.description: `dedupe-peers=true` would have collapsed a distinct peer-variant; preserved the longer form to avoid dropping it.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_LOCKFILE_MERGE_CONFLICT
warnings.description: Branch-lockfile merge had conflicting entries for the same dep_path; one was chosen.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_LOCKFILE_MERGE_CLEANUP_FAILED
warnings.description: After a successful merge, removing one of the merged branch lockfiles failed.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_YARN_BERRY_UNSUPPORTED
warnings.description: A Yarn Berry `patch:` / `portal:` / `exec:` protocol — or any unrecognized protocol — was found in `yarn.lock`. Entry was skipped.

warnings.name: WARN_AUBE_PROGRESS_OVERFLOW
warnings.description: Install progress numerator exceeded the resolved-package denominator. Display clamps to total; the warning surfaces the bookkeeping mismatch so the underlying race can be diagnosed.
